text: Education: National Education Policy 2020. Replaces 1986 policy. 5+3+3+4 school structure. Mother tongue medium till Class 5. Multiple entry-exit in higher education. Academic Bank of Credits. National Research Foundation. Target: 6% GDP on education.

Education: PM SHRI Schools. 14,500 schools upgraded as model NEP schools. ₹27,360 crore. Smart classrooms, labs, green schools. Discovery-based learning. 21st century skills focus. National benchmarks for quality education.

Education: Samagra Shiksha. ₹37,453 crore FY24. Integrated scheme for school education (pre-school to Class 12). 14.89 lakh schools. Transport/escort for girls. Inclusive education for CWSN. Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalaya: 750+ operational.

Education: National Skill Development Mission. 4 crore youth trained through PMKVY and other schemes. 15,000 Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Kendras. Recognition of Prior Learning. Industry linkages for placement. Skill India Digital Hub.

Education: Atal Tinkering Labs by NITI Aayog's Atal Innovation Mission. 10,000 labs in schools across India. STEM and innovation focus. Robotics, 3D printing, IoT equipment. 75 lakh+ students benefited. Innovation ecosystem in schools.
